activitydaily.title: Daily activity bar chart for user {0}
commands: SELECT (timestamp - MOD(timestamp, 86400)) AS hour_start, COUNT(timestamp) AS avg_count FROM activity WHERE uid = '{0}' GROUP BY hour_start

activityhourly.title: Hourly activity bar chart for user {0}
commands: SELECT (`timestamp` - (`timestamp` % 3600)) AS hourly_window, COUNT(timestamp) AS row_count FROM activity WHERE uid = '{0}' GROUP BY hourly_window ORDER BY hourly_window ASC
